name: Finicity Open Banking Financial Data REST API
what_it_does: Finicity (Mastercard) open banking and financial data aggregation REST API for lenders, fintechs, and financial institutions to access consumer and SMB bank account data, income verification, asset verification, transaction history, and cash flow analytics — enabling automated financial data sharing, mortgage underwriting, income and employment verification, and personal finance management through Finicity's open banking platform with 10,000+ FI connections and Mastercard's global network. Enables AI agents to manage account aggregation for consumer bank account connection and data access automation, handle income verification for employment and income digital verification automation, access asset verification for bank account balance and asset proof automation, retrieve transaction data for financial history and cash flow analysis automation, manage cash flow analytics for income stability and expense pattern automation, handle consent management for consumer open banking permission automation, access account validation for micro-deposit and instant verification automation, retrieve financial insights for consumer spending categorization automation, manage mortgage verification for GSE-compliant digital verification automation, and integrate Finicity with LOS (Loan Origination Systems), PFM apps, and GSE mortgage platforms for open banking automation.
use_cases: Verifying consumer income and employment digitally for mortgage lender underwriting automation agents
Accessing consumer bank account data for personal financial management app automation agents
Performing instant account verification for ACH payment setup automation agents
Analyzing cash flow and income stability for consumer lending risk assessment automation agents
not_for: Payment processing (Finicity is data aggregation, not payment initiation or processing)
Business banking operations (Finicity primarily serves consumer financial data, not corporate banking)
Real-time fraud detection (Finicity is periodic data access, not real-time transaction monitoring)
best_when: A mortgage lender, fintech, neobank, or financial institution wanting AI agents to access consumer bank account data, verify income and assets digitally, analyze cash flow, and enable open banking data sharing through Finicity's Mastercard-backed financial data platform.
avoid_when: CONSUMER CONSENT IS MANDATORY: Finicity requires explicit consumer consent for data access; automated no-consent assumption creates consent_required; automated must implement Finicity consumer authorization flow before data access. MASTERCARD NETWORK IS THE TRUST LAYER: Finicity operates within Mastercard Open Banking network; automated independent aggregator assumption creates Mastercard_ecosystem_required for production data access; automated must follow Mastercard Open Banking partner requirements. FI CONNECTION VARIES BY INSTITUTION: Finicity connection quality varies by financial institution (scrape vs. API); automated uniform-quality assumption creates connectivity_degradation for FIs without direct API connection; automated must handle connection method variations. GSE VERIFICATION REQUIRES SPECIFIC REPORT TYPES: Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac mortgage verification requires specific Finicity report types (VOA, VOI); automated generic data assumption creates GSE_non-compliant report for mortgage underwriting; automated must use GSE-specific Finicity verification report types.

auth.notes: Finicity uses API key + OAuth2 for financial data REST API. REST API with JSON. Salt Lake City, UT HQ. Founded 1999. Acquired by Mastercard 2020. Products: Open Banking (account aggregation), Income/Employment Verification, Asset Verification, Mortgage Reports (VOA, VOI), Cash Flow Analytics. 10,000+ FI connections. SDKs: JS/Python/Java/Ruby. GSE-accepted (Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac). Competes with Plaid, MX Technologies, and Yodlee for financial data aggregation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for registered developers; production requires Finicity partner agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-connection and per-report pricing; annual subscription for lending verification; enterprise custom pricing via Mastercard
pricing.notes: Salt Lake City UT. Mastercard subsidiary. Per-connection pricing. 10,000+ FI connections. GSE-accepted.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; aggregation and verification APIs throttled per partner tier

known_agent_gotchas: CONSUMER AUTHORIZATION FLOW IS REQUIRED: Every Finicity data access requires consumer authorization via Connect URL or SDK; automated direct data access assumption creates authorization_required; automated must implement Finicity consumer Connect flow for each new account connection

REPORT GENERATION IS ASYNC: Finicity verification reports (VOA, VOI) are generated asynchronously; automated synchronous report assumption creates report_not_ready; automated must poll or use webhooks for report completion notification

MFA CHALLENGES MAY INTERRUPT FLOW: Some FI connections require MFA during account aggregation; automated no-MFA assumption creates mfa_challenge for institutions requiring step-up verification; automated must handle MFA challenge responses in Connect flow

TRANSACTION HISTORY WINDOW IS FI-DEPENDENT: Available transaction history varies by financial institution; automated unlimited history assumption creates max_history_limit for FIs with restricted history availability; automated must handle variable transaction history depth

GSE REPORTS HAVE EXPIRATION: Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac VOA/VOI reports expire after 120 days; automated permanent verification assumption creates expired_report for mortgage processing delays; automated must track and refresh Finicity verification reports within GSE validity windows
agent_readiness.security_notes: Financial data. FCRA, GLBA, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US. Consumer bank account and income data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Open banking. FCRA, GLBA, FFIEC. OAuth2. US. Consumer financial account data.
